SCP 0.1.2.9004
  • Reference

    Cell classification

    CellScoring.Rd

    Cell classification

    CellScoring(
  srt,
  features,
  ncores = 1,
  method = "Seurat",
  classification = TRUE,
  name = "CC",
  slot = "data",
  assay = "RNA",
  new_assay = FALSE,
  ...
)

    Examples

    data("pancreas1k")
ccgenes <- CC_GenePrefetch("Mus_musculus")
#> Connecting to the Ensembl archives...
#> Using the 103 version of biomart...
#> Connecting to the biomart...
#> Connecting to the dataset hsapiens_gene_ensembl ...
#> Match and convert the geneID...
#> 97 genes mapped with ensembl_symbol
#> ==============================
#> 97 genes mapped
#> 0 genes unmapped
#> ==============================
pancreas1k <- CellScoring(srt = pancreas1k, features = list(S = ccgenes$cc_S_genes, G2M = ccgenes$cc_G2M_genes), nbin = 20)
#> Warning: object is not log normalized
#> Warning: The following features are not present in the object: Pimreg, not searching for symbol synonyms
ClassDimPlot(pancreas1k, "CC_classification")

ExpDimPlot(pancreas1k, "CC_G2M")
